---
title: "Welcome message"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{welcome-message}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

```{r setup}
library(squirrels)
```

<!-- WARNING - This vignette is generated by {fusen} from dev/flat_get_welcome_message.Rmd: do not edit by hand -->

# Get welcome message

```{r examples-my_fun}
date_ok <- "01/12/2023"
get_welcome_message(date_ok)
```
